summary_en: ROE target of 8% by fiscal year ending March 2027. Specific payout ratio floor or additional metrics not disclosed in excerpt.
title_en: FY2026 (Year Ending March 2026) Earnings Presentation: Initiatives toward Management with Focus on Cost of Capital and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: Iwabuchi Corporation filed earnings presentation materials for the fiscal year ending March 2026 dated 15 May 2026. The disclosure addresses the company's initiatives toward cost-of-capital-conscious management. The materials include company overview, current period results, forward guidance, and efforts to enhance capital efficiency. The document explicitly covers 'initiatives regarding the realization of management with focus on cost of capital and stock price.' Specific numeric targets and detailed payout policy parameters are not fully visible in the two-page excerpt provided.
